creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fix compatibility with recent ffmpeg versions by deprecating 
S24 data format - backporting upstream SVN revision r44:

http://code.google.com/p/avbin/source/diff?spec=svn44&r=44&format=side&path=/trunk/src/avbin.c

Added file(s):
- files/patch-src-avbin.c

This is for preparation for the ffmpeg 0.5 update

Port maintainer (amdmi3@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
